flows.review_excerpt: Provide one resubmission containing all three required elements (A+B+C) in the same execution output; then it can PASS.

flows.review_excerpt: - Use this minimal structure in one output: two concrete command outputs, one `docs/...:line` goal citation, one `model-flow: strong->cheap->strong` line, and one measurable pipeline success-rate alignment statement.

flows.plan_excerpt: pipeline success-rate alignment statement: review is goal-aligned only if 7-day pipeline success rate is `>= 80%` with at least `10` tasks; otherwise it is a measurable miss requiring remediation.
